display.purpose: Hero h1 only. Wine color, tight tracking. Carries identity.

title.purpose: Sub-section h3 and dt definition terms. Teal color.

body.purpose: Default paragraph text. Ink color. Capped at 65-75ch via 38rem max-width.

label.purpose: Eyebrow labels above sections, chip text, install caption, button text. Uppercase 0.12em letter-spacing.

mono.purpose: Install command, code blocks, file paths. Reserved for technical content only.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease-out for entry animations (typing terminal, position-addressed grid cells, timeline phase reveals).

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Stronger settle for scroll-pinned sections and template gallery cross-fades.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Template gallery folder-tree cross-fade. Hover state transitions.

motion.name: duration-medium
motion.purpose: Hero typing-terminal cadence. Position-addressed grid stagger total.

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Live-status pill. Rose-tinted background, wine border, leading wine dot. Used for version + release-state callouts in the hero.
components.html: v0.0.1 - tracer slice live - v1.0 coming
components.css: .ds-status-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 12px; background: oklch(0.78 0.06 15 / 0.15); color: oklch(0.45 0.13 18); border: 1px solid oklch(0.45 0.13 18 / 0.30); border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0; } .ds-status-badge__dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.45 0.13 18); }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Wine-fill stamped block. Used for the second install CTA at the bottom of the page; not used on the hero (the hero uses the install code block instead).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.45 0.13 18); color: oklch(0.97 0.01 80); border: 1px solid oklch(0.45 0.13 18); border-radius: 2px; padding: 12px 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; line-height: 1.2; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.38 0.14 18); border-color: oklch(0.38 0.14 18); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.78 0.10 75); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Cream-on-ink ghost block. Used for GitHub / npm / docs links in the footer-style sections.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.97 0.01 80); color: oklch(0.30 0.02 280); border: 1px solid oklch(0.45 0.02 280); border-radius: 2px; padding: 12px 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; line-height: 1.2; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: oklch(0.30 0.02 280); background: oklch(0.92 0.012 80); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.78 0.10 75); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Section Marker
components.description: Numbered eyebrow label that opens every page section. Mirrors the vault's position-addressed prefix scheme. Brand asset: design demonstrates methodology.
components.css: .ds-section-marker { display: inline-block; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; line-height: 1.2; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.55 0.05 195); margin-bottom: 24px; }

components.name: Install Code Block
components.description: Hero install block. Cream-on-ink inversion with amber prompt. Live-typed in the actual page; this snapshot shows the resting state. Click-to-copy (button overlaid in the live page, omitted here for the panel snapshot).
components.css: .ds-install { background: oklch(0.30 0.02 280); color: oklch(0.95 0.01 80); border: 1px solid oklch(0.45 0.13 18 / 0.30); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px 24px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; overflow-x: auto; } .ds-install__prompt { color: oklch(0.78 0.10 75); margin-right: 8px; }

components.name: Comparison Row
components.description: One row of the brand-thesis comparison table. Two columns (system name in mono, what's missing in body). Alternating rows use cream-deep tonal lift. The table itself is the brand argument.
components.html:
Karpathy raw -> wiki
No template; you build it manually
components.css: .ds-cmp-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr; gap: 16px; padding: 12px 16px; background: oklch(0.78 0.06 15 / 0.10); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.45 0.13 18 / 0.15); transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-cmp-row:hover { background: oklch(0.78 0.06 15 / 0.18); } .ds-cmp-row__sys { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 14px; color: oklch(0.30 0.02 280); } .ds-cmp-row__missing { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.30 0.02 280); }

components.name: Card Paper
components.description: Generic content surface. Cream-pale tonal lift over the page background; hairline wine border at 15% alpha; sharp corners. No shadow.
components.html:
Init

Scaffolds a position-addressed vault skeleton, drops a 6-file harness layer, and writes router files for every major LLM harness.
components.css: .ds-card-paper { background: oklch(0.97 0.01 80); border: 1px solid oklch(0.45 0.13 18 / 0.15); border-radius: 0; padding: 24px 28px; max-width: 520px; } .ds-card-paper__title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; color: oklch(0.55 0.05 195); margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-paper__body { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.30 0.02 280); margin: 0; }

components.name: Hero Headline
components.description: Display Lora wine. Identity surface. Used once per page on the hero h1.
components.css: .ds-hero-h1 { font-family: Lora, Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(2.75rem, 6vw, 4.5rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: oklch(0.45 0.13 18); margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: ideaverse-os is a tech zine made of position-addressed cells. Each section of the page lives at its own numbered slot, hierarchically nested, cross-linked, harness-agnostic - exactly like the vault the product builds. The information architecture mirrors the product architecture; the design IS the methodology demonstrated. The atmosphere is warm-paper editorial with technical receipts. Cream backgrounds carry the page; wine serif headlines anchor identity; ink body text reads long; muted accent hues thread through diagrams, chips, and pull quotes the way a careful researcher annotates a printed document. The system is opinionated and slightly contrarian by design - the comparison table that names every competitor methodology IS the brand argument.
keyCharacteristics: Cream-paper foundation with cream-on-cream tonal layering (no shadows).
Wine serif as identity anchor; ink as the workhorse text color.
Multi-hue accent palette (rose, amber, blue, lavender) used semantically, not decoratively.
Editorial typography: Lora 700 display, Inter body, Geist Mono code.
Sharp corners (0-4px max). Hairline 1px borders or no borders at all.
Position-addressed information architecture. Every section is a numbered cell.
Motion is teaching, not decoration. Reduced-motion gracefully reveals static composition.

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: In product register (concept docs pages), at most one accent color appears at any given time, occupying <=10% of viewport surface. Wine is the default. Mixing accents on a single docs page is forbidden - choose one.

rules.name: The Pure-Black Ban
rules.body: #000 is never used. All neutrals tint toward purple-grey via the ink hue. #fff is never used either - every cream is warmed.

rules.name: The OKLCH-Only Rule
rules.body: All tokens are authored in OKLCH. Hex values appear only in commentary as approximations. Lightness and chroma are deliberately reduced near 0/100 to avoid garish color at extremes.

rules.name: The Reader's Length Rule
rules.body: Body paragraphs cap at 65-75ch (38rem). Sidebars and pull-quotes may run shorter. No paragraph runs the full viewport width.

rules.name: The Hierarchy Contrast Rule
rules.body: Each step in the type scale must contrast >=1.25x in size or >=200 weight units from its parent. Flat scales are prohibited - readers must feel hierarchy without reading the labels.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Code Rule
rules.body: Geist Mono is reserved for code, file paths, shell commands, and JSON keys. It is not used for branding flourishes, eyebrow labels, or tagline poetry - that's Inter Label's job.

rules.name: The Flat-Paper Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat. Depth is communicated through cream-on-cream tonal shifts (cream-pale lifts, cream-deep recedes) and 1px hairline borders, never through shadow. The only exception is the focus ring, which uses an outline.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Borders are 1px. Wider colored stripes - especially side-stripe accent borders - are forbidden. If a divider needs more weight, increase its color saturation, not its thickness.

dos: Do use OKLCH for all color authoring. Hex is approximation only.
Do keep wine to 30-60% of viewport surface in brand register, <=10% in product register.
Do use cream-on-cream tonal layering for depth. Three cream values (cream, cream-pale, cream-deep) is the elevation system.
Do open every section with a numbered eyebrow label (00 / OVERVIEW style). The position-addressed grid is a brand asset.
Do cite the methodology source for every claim - Karpathy / Milo / Chief / Forte / Medin / Cursor / Claude - in pull-quotes, footnotes, or inline.
Do cap body text at 65-75ch (38rem max-width on text containers).
Do provide a prefers-reduced-motion fallback that statically reveals every animated element.
Do scope all ideaverse-os tokens to the /ideaverse-os/* route. The parent app's dark theme must remain on every other route.
Do show harness-agnostic examples (Cursor / Aider / Codex / Gemini CLI) wherever a Claude example appears.
Do use ASCII-only copy. No em dashes, no smart quotes, no ellipsis characters.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff. Every neutral is tinted toward the brand hue family.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left >1px as a colored accent). Use full hairline borders or background tints instead.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text over a gradient). Solid wine on cream is the identity.
Don't use glassmorphism. No backdrop-filter: blur(...) on cards. Forbidden by the Flat-Paper Rule.
Don't use hero metric grids (10x faster / 5min setup / 99.9% uptime).
Don't use the dark-navy-cyan SaaS landing aesthetic. The parent ktncodes-v2 site already owns dark; ideaverse-os owns warm-paper editorial.
Don't use animated chatbot mockups, abstract 3D blobs, particle backgrounds, or 'Meet your AI second brain' copy.
Don't render the page as README-with-a-stylesheet. No shields.io badge rows. No table-of-contents sidebars in marketing pages.
Don't use box-shadow on any surface. Depth via tonal cream only.
Don't mix accent colors on a single product-register docs page. Per the One-Voice Rule.
Don't make motion load-bearing. Every animation must have a prefers-reduced-motion static-state equivalent.
Don't use beige sticky-note backgrounds or three-pane vault screenshots.
Don't assume Claude Code in copy. The product is harness-agnostic.
